logger.message: #["[ANALYTICS SYSTEM API] Tracking event | Type: " ++ (vars.analyticsEventType default "unknown") ++ " | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Track Request

http:request.doc:name: POST Track Event
http:request.http:body: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { orderId: vars.orderId default "unknown", customerId: vars.customerId default "unknown", customerTier: vars.customerTier default "STANDARD", sku: vars.orderSku default "unknown", quantity: vars.orderQuantity default 0, orderValue: vars.orderValue default 0, eventType: vars.analyticsEventType default "ORDER_EVENT", channel: "MULESOFT_INTEGRATION", metadata: { routingPath: vars.routingPath default "unknown", processingPriority: vars.processingPriority default "STANDARD", correlationId: vars.correlationId default "unknown" } }]

logger.message: #["[ANALYTICS SYSTEM API] Event tracked | EventId: " ++ (payload.data.eventId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Event Tracked

logger.message: #["[ANALYTICS SYSTEM API] Event tracking failed — continuing | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown") ++ " | Error: " ++ error.description]
logger.doc:name: Log Analytics Error

logger.message: #["[ANALYTICS SYSTEM API] Metrics retrieved | Total Orders: " ++ (payload.data.realtime.totalOrders default 0 as String) ++ " | Revenue: $" ++ (payload.data.realtime.totalRevenue default 0 as String)]
logger.doc:name: Log Metrics Retrieved

logger.message: #['[ANALYTICS SYSTEM API] Metrics unavailable — returning defaults']
logger.doc:name: Log Metrics Error

set-payload.doc:name: Default Metrics Response

logger.message: #["[ANALYTICS SYSTEM API] Fetching order events | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Events Request

logger.message: #["[ANALYTICS SYSTEM API] Events retrieved | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown") ++ " | Count: " ++ (payload.data.eventCount default 0 as String)]
logger.doc:name: Log Events Retrieved

logger.message: #["[ANALYTICS SYSTEM API] Order events unavailable | OrderId: " ++ (vars.orderId default "unknown")]
logger.doc:name: Log Events Error
